headline: School Counselors Handle 800 Students Each Despite Rising Mental Health Needs
context: MOE's counselor-to-student ratio remains at 1:800 while student mental health referrals doubled between 2022 and 2025.

cards.big: School counselors manage 800 students each while mental health referrals doubled since 2022
cards.sub: WHO recommends 1 counselor per 250 students for effective coverage

cards.big: Student suicide attempts reported to schools increased 45% from 2022 to 2025
cards.sub: MOE recorded 1,247 cases requiring emergency mental health intervention in 2025

cards.big: Only 34% of school counselors hold professional counseling qualifications
cards.sub: Many are teachers reassigned to counseling roles with minimal specialized training

cards.big: Japan deployed 5,000 additional school counselors after 2020 youth mental health crisis
cards.sub: Rapid scale-up reduced school-reported self-harm incidents by 18% within 2 years

cards.big: One counselor for 800 students is not a support system—it is a checkbox exercise
Should Malaysia triple the number of qualified school counselors by 2028
